subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Once again thou hast quaffed from the living waters from the Hand of Bounty of Him Who is the Goal of all worlds. Forever shall thy mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد مره اخری کوثر حیوان از ید عطاء مقصود عالمیان آشامیدی لازال ذکرت در
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
